title: Conduct biological surveys
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct biological surveys demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary design activities for the biological survey

pcs.text: Identify survey scope, objectives and constraints according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify survey scope, objectives and constraints according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify survey scope, objectives and constraints according to client brief.

pcs.text: Source, collate and evaluate current data relevant to survey requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source, collate and evaluate current data relevant to survey requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source, collate and evaluate current data relevant to survey requirements.

pcs.text: Develop processes for data collection and processing consistent with the survey scope, objectives and constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop processes for data collection and processing consistent with the survey scope, objectives and constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop processes for data collection and processing consistent with the survey scope, objectives and constraints.

pcs.text: Design survey plan reflecting client requirements and present to client for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design survey plan reflecting client requirements and present to client for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design survey plan reflecting client requirements and present to client for approval.

pcs.text: Incorporate workplace health and safety and environmental sustainability and biosecurity procedures into plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate workplace health and safety and environmental sustainability and biosecurity procedures into plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate workplace health and safety and environmental sustainability and biosecurity procedures into plan.

elements.title: Determine requirements of the biological survey

pcs.text: Identify biological survey indicators and evaluate constraints and opportunities for data collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify biological survey indicators and evaluate constraints and opportunities for data collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biological survey indicators and evaluate constraints and opportunities for data collection.

pcs.text: Identify data collection points that are repeatable and statistically representative
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify data collection points that are repeatable and statistically representative?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify data collection points that are repeatable and statistically representative.

pcs.text: Identify hazards associated with a biological survey, assess risks and develop controls, determine costs, and document in the survey design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards associated with a biological survey, assess risks and develop controls, determine costs, and document in the survey design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards associated with a biological survey, assess risks and develop controls, determine costs, and document in the survey design.

pcs.text: Secure permits and approvals required for survey according to ethical standards, workplace procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure permits and approvals required for survey according to ethical standards, workplace procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure permits and approvals required for survey according to ethical standards, workplace procedures and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Determine tools, equipment and machinery required for the survey and confirm availability with suppliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine tools, equipment and machinery required for the survey and confirm availability with suppliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine tools, equipment and machinery required for the survey and confirm availability with suppliers.

pcs.text: Schedule survey activities and surveyor access according to the survey design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule survey activities and surveyor access according to the survey design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule survey activities and surveyor access according to the survey design.

pcs.text: Document survey procedures and schedules and present to stakeholders and client for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document survey procedures and schedules and present to stakeholders and client for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document survey procedures and schedules and present to stakeholders and client for approval.

elements.title: Conduct the biological survey

pcs.text: Conduct field visit to verify existing data and update information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct field visit to verify existing data and update information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct field visit to verify existing data and update information.

pcs.text: Conduct the biological survey according to the survey design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct the biological survey according to the survey design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct the biological survey according to the survey design.

pcs.text: Monitor survey activities for accuracy, compliance to the survey design and legislative and ethical standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor survey activities for accuracy, compliance to the survey design and legislative and ethical standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor survey activities for accuracy, compliance to the survey design and legislative and ethical standards.

pcs.text: Undertake staged data collection according to the survey design, scheduling and surveyor access requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake staged data collection according to the survey design, scheduling and surveyor access requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake staged data collection according to the survey design, scheduling and surveyor access requirements.

pcs.text: Record all monitoring and survey data according to specifications of the survey design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all monitoring and survey data according to specifications of the survey design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all monitoring and survey data according to specifications of the survey design.

pcs.text: Analyse data and draw conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data and draw conclusions based on evidence and reasoned arguments.

pcs.text: Prepare a biological survey report according to agreed timeframes and client outcomes and workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a biological survey report according to agreed timeframes and client outcomes and workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a biological survey report according to agreed timeframes and client outcomes and workplace standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present report to the client.
